raw_consumer_statement: We had foreign transaction fraud last XXXX and XX/XX/year> that was not authorized by us that well exceeded our credit limit. It was partially resolved but there is still an unresolved balance of {$5600.00} as of XXXX XXXX. We have contacted Citi bank several times and send detailed information but are not able to get information on the transactions in the unresolved balance to dispute the charges. It is now being reported for late payments and affecting our credit reports.
